title: AmazonOrderExtraction
description: Structured output schema for parsing Amazon order confirmation emails into Zenset Retreats' order tracker.

order_date.description: The date the order was placed, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.

order_number.description: The Amazon order number, including dashes. Format: 111-XXXXXXX-XXXXXXX.

ship_to.description: The recipient name from the Ship to section, deduplicated. Use an em dash for cancelled orders with no ship-to.

placed_by.description: The name of the person who placed the order, deduplicated.

order_total.description: Order total as a string with dollar sign and two decimals (e.g., $53.95). Use $0.00 for cancelled orders.

status.description: The current status of the order.

items.description: One entry per product in the order. Even single-item orders return an array.

description.description: Full product title, cleaned of redundant marketing fluff but preserving brand, model, size, and count.

item_url.description: The clean Amazon product URL in the format https://www.amazon.com/dp/ASIN. Strip all tracking parameters (?ref=, ?tag=, etc.). If no URL is available, use an empty string.

item_price.description: Item price as a string with dollar sign and two decimals (e.g., $37.49). Use $0.00 for cancelled orders.
